section_miscategorizations.text: The patient denies chest pain or belly pain.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Denials of symptoms are part of the patient-reported history/ROS rather than objective exam findings; however, this is a common documentation pattern and not highly misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is currently taking 2.5 mg of norvasc.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes the current medication regimen (history/medication state), not a new order or change in therapy; it would more appropriately belong in HPI or a medication history section.
